name: James Poyser
abstract: James Jason Poyser (b. January 30, 1967) is an American record producer, multi-instrumentalist, and songwriter from Philadelphia, Pennsylvania.

concerts.label: The Music of David Byrne and Talking Heads
concerts.venue: Isaac Stern Auditorium / Ronald O. Perelman Stage

about_quotes.speaker: Robert Glasper
about_quotes.evidence: I’m watching James Poyser and I’m playing all these hip-hop tracks now
about_quotes.doc_title: Robert Glasper interviewed by Greg Thomas, Clinton, New York, February 20, 2016
